description: When you want to show off your sporty style, there is no better way to do it than with this bag from adidas. Height: 42 cm Width: 28 cm Depth: 13 cm Made of 100% polyester with a nylon lining One main zippered compartment with a separator to hold your laptop One zippered compartment on the front with organiser pouches and a mobile pouch; has printed branding and the adidas 3-Stripe on it Padded and adjustable shoulder straps with Adidas logo Fabric haul loop for handling ease Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
